2206620.name: RPG Maker MZ - NPC Female Soldiers Vol.1
2206620.description:
Give your battle-ready female characters some fitting voices with the NPC Female Soldiers Vol1! TK.Projects suited up and jumped into making a new pack of Japanese voices, this time focusing on character voices that could be found out on the battlefield. Forget the squeaky voices of children, this pack’s 120 SEs include more mature voices for your favorite ladies. Find the perfect voices for your game’s female guards, knights, and generals in this pack!

Features:

* 120 different phrases and sayings
* 12 characters, 10 SE per character
* ogg and m4a file formats included

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
2206620.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
